description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow consists of three jobs: linting, docs, and tests. The linting job checks code style with tox on Python 3.12, the docs job builds documentation with tox on Python 3.12, and the tests job runs tests with tox on multiple Python versions (3.8 to 3.12) and reports coverage to Coveralls.
